description: Plugin-distributed hooks for automotive-dealership. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags dealership anti-patterns (payment packing, plaintext customer NPI, undated rate/PVR figures, ads lacking required disclosure). Set AUTOMOTIVE_DEALERSHIP_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
